title: Flooding Disrupts Life in Dhampur and Surrounding Villages Once More: Why do we Fail in Flood Mitigation?
description: The monsoon rains bring a respite from the scorching summer heat and promise of a good harvest, but it also brings perils of inundation that disrupt life and livelihoods. This monsoon season, 47 people have reportedly died in Bijnor district due to flooding. In addition, it was estimated that 4548 hectares of land were affected […] The post Flooding Disrupts Life in Dhampur and Surrounding Villages Once More: Why do we Fail in Flood Mitigation? appeared first on CPR.
